svg.title: ResNet-style architecture diagram for CIFAR-10
svg.desc: Pipeline from a 32x32x3 input image through adapted conv, ResNet blocks, global average pooling, a feature vector, a head, softmax, and a 10-class output distribution.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the 32×32×3 input represent in a CNN?')
sendPrompt('Why adapt Conv1 for CIFAR-10 vs ImageNet in ResNet?')
sendPrompt('How do residual blocks work in ResNet?')
sendPrompt('What does global average pooling do in a CNN?')
sendPrompt('What information does the feature vector encode?')
sendPrompt('What does the classification head do?')
sendPrompt('How does softmax turn logits into a probability distribution?')
sendPrompt('What does the 10-dim output distribution mean for CIFAR-10?')

svg.text: → forward pass flows right → down → left (click any block to learn more)
